{{Quote|Duro. They're going to hit the shipyards in thirty-six standard hours.|[[Jace Malcom]]|<ref name="Annihilation">''[[The Old Republic: Annihilation]]''</ref>}}
'''Duro Starshipwright Shipyards''', abbreviated to '''DSS''', were a number of orbital [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. They were very large stations, capable of accommodating a wide variety of [[Starship/Legends|starships]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Station-stub}}
